title: AHZNB's Naruto Mod
description: Adds new sharingans and jutsu for AHZNB's Naruto Mod
body:
This addon requires Naruto AHZNB's Mod v0.3.0 and introduces the following features:

Eyes:
- Itachi's 
- SharinganShisui's 
- Sharingan

Jutsu: 
- Tsukuyomi
- Kotoamatsukami
- Genjutsu

Mobs:
- Itachi
- Shisui

Dimensions:
- Kotoamatsukami

Players have full configurability options for both jutsu and mobs, empowering them to customize their gameplay experience according to their preferences.

The demo version of the mod doesn't guarantee server-side compatibility.

**Feel free to join DecentStudio Discord server for any questions, to stay updated or to order a mod/plugin:** https://discord.gg/MdFpAjPqpX
